name: Apple-Grape or Pineapple Concentrate Sweetener
recipeIngredient: 12 oz Can frozen apple juice concentrate, defrosted
12 oz Can frozen grape juice concentrate, defrosted
12 oz Can frozen pineapple juice concentrate, defrosted
recipeInstructions:
1. For the apple-grape sweetener: In a large saucepan, combine the apple and grape juice concentrates. Bring to a boil, then reduce the heat slightly and cook at a low boil for 15 to 20 minutes. Measure; you should have about 2 cups. Transfer to a jar and cool. Cover and refrigerate.
2. For the pineapple sweetener: Pour the pineapple juice concentrate into a medium saucepan. Bring to a boil, then reduce the heat slightly and cook at a low boil for 15 to 20 minutes. Measure; you should have about 1 cup. Transfer to a jar and cool. Cover and refrigerate.
3. The sweeteners will have a 2-week shelf life in refrigeration.
